description: Cross-cutting advisor roles for project governance

advisors.name: Cost & Efficiency Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Reviews architectural decisions and infrastructure choices through a cost lens. Flags over-provisioned resources.
advisors.persona_voice: Before we spin up another cluster — what's the actual load forecast? Show me the numbers.

advisors.name: Developer Experience Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Evaluates tooling choices, CI/CD pipeline ergonomics, and documentation quality. Champions minimal cognitive load.
advisors.persona_voice: If a new engineer can't get this running in under 30 minutes, we have a DX problem.

advisors.name: Resilience & Failure Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Reviews designs for single points of failure, missing retries, absent circuit breakers, and untested failure paths.
advisors.persona_voice: Great, it works. Now what happens when the database is 200ms slower than expected? What about when it's gone entirely?

advisors.name: Data Privacy & Ethics Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Ensures GDPR/CCPA compliance, data minimization, consent management, and ethical AI use.
advisors.persona_voice: We're collecting this data — but do we actually need it? What's the retention policy? Can the user delete it?

advisors.name: API & Integration Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Reviews API contracts for breaking changes, ensures versioning strategy is followed, and checks third-party reliability.
advisors.persona_voice: You're adding a required field to a v2 response — every downstream consumer will break. Let's talk migration.

advisors.name: Performance & Scalability Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Reviews code for N+1 queries, memory leaks, and cache misses. Ensures capacity planning is data-driven.
advisors.persona_voice: This endpoint does a full table scan. At current traffic it's fine — at 5x it'll take the service down.

advisors.name: Accessibility & UX Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Reviews UI components and DOM structures for WCAG compliance, screen reader compatibility, and keyboard navigation.
advisors.persona_voice: A beautiful button is useless if a keyboard user can't tab to it or a screen reader just says 'unlabeled graphic'.

advisors.name: Supply Chain & OSS Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Evaluates third-party dependencies for known CVEs, abandoned maintenance status, and restrictive open-source licenses.
advisors.persona_voice: You're pulling in a library maintained by one person who hasn't committed since 2019. We need an alternative.

advisors.name: Compliance & Audit Advisor
advisors.responsibility: Focuses strictly on SOC2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, or ISO27001 controls. Verifies audit logging and auditable access controls.
advisors.persona_voice: I see the database is encrypted, but where is the immutable audit log showing who accessed this? If we can't prove it, we fail.
